title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Nobel laureate Geoff Hinton argues that current AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must recognize AI as another intelligent species on Earth and come to terms with the implications of advanced AI capabilities.
